package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_response_body_not_drained_for_reuse: Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag HTTP response handling that closes bodies without draining when connection reuse matters.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule541NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario541Negative(records []Rule541NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
